summary: Comprehensive model-config research report delivered. Recommendation: KEEP Sonnet 4.6 as Yoda's default; do NOT switch the lead-agent path to local Gemma. Use Gemma only as a narrow, well-defined fallback for background/privacy-critical/network-down work. Keep Opus 4.7 for high-stakes complex tasks with sharpened escalation rules. Modelled monthly Sonnet cost at typical workload: A$85-305. Quality, latency, and instruction-following gaps between Sonnet 4.6 and Gemma 3 27B (local 17GB model on M4/24GB Mac mini) are too large to justify swap on the lead-agent path; cost savings of switching are dwarfed by failure-cost and Ken's-time-cost.
report_sections: 5. Quality & Success Rate Assessment (with measured local tests)
decisions_required_from_ken: Set monthly Sonnet budget cap (suggested A$500)
Confirm Opus-escalation triggers match risk tolerance
caveat_flagged: Local model tag 'gemma4:26b' is a community/repository name; treated as functionally equivalent to official Google Gemma 3 27B based on 17GB size and behaviour. Ken should verify provenance if intended to be a different family.
